name: Probely
description: Probely — DAST and API security scanner for web applications with Swagger/OpenAPI support and CI/CD integration.

seo.title: Probely — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Probely: Probely — DAST and API security scanner for web applications with Swagger/OpenAPI support and CI/CD integration.

when_to_use: DAST web application scanning integrated with GitHub Actions
OWASP Top 10 vulnerability detection in staging environments
Continuous DAST scan scheduling for production monitoring
PCI DSS-aligned web application scanning for compliance

pros: Strong API and OpenAPI-driven scanning workflows
Solid CI/CD integrations for pipeline scanning
cons: DAST-only, no SAST or SCA coverage
Coverage depends heavily on spec quality
Smaller brand footprint than Burp or Invicti
Advanced auth flows still need manual configuration
review.verdict: Clean DAST option well-suited to API-first teams; pair it with SAST and SCA for full AppSec.
review.best_for: API-heavy dev teams wanting developer-friendly DAST inside CI/CD pipelines.
review.not_for: Shops wanting one vendor for SAST, SCA, and DAST in a single unified console.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
